lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਧਿਕਾਈ ਰੋਗੁ ਕਾਟੈ ਸੂਖਿ ਸਵੀਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tan man saant hoe adhikaaee rog kaattai sookh saveejai |3|
lines.english: My mind and body are calm and tranquil; the disease has been cured, and now I sleep in peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਠਾਈ ਸਭ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਵੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau sooraj kiran raviaa sarab tthaaee sabh ghatt ghatt raam raveejai |
lines.english: As the rays of the sun spread out everywhere, the Lord pervades each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਧ ਮਿਲੇ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਤਤੁ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠਿਆ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: saadhoo saadh mile ras paavai tat nij ghar baitthiaa peejai |4|
lines.english: Meeting the Holy Saint, one drinks in the Sublime Essence of the Lord; sitting in the home of your own inner being, drink in the essence. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਤੀ ਜਿਉ ਚਕਵੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਸੂਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: jan kau preet lagee gur setee jiau chakavee dekh sooreejai |
lines.english: The humble being is in love with the Guru, like the chakvi bird which loves to see the sun.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਸੁਆਨ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਲੋਭੀ ਬਹੁ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਭਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: saakat suaan kaheeeh bahu lobhee bahu duramat mail bhareejai |
lines.english: The faithless cynic is said to be very greedy - he is a dog. He is overflowing with the filth and pollution of evil-mindedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਖਤ ਨਿਰਖਤ ਰੈਨਿ ਸਭ ਨਿਰਖੀ ਮੁਖੁ ਕਾਢੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: nirakhat nirakhat rain sabh nirakhee mukh kaadtai amrit peejai |5|
lines.english: She watches, and keeps on watching all through the night; and when the sun shows its face, she drinks in the Amrit. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਸੁਆਇ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਬਾਤਾ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਾ ਵਿਸਾਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aapan suaae kareh bahu baataa tinaa kaa visaahu kiaa keejai |6|
lines.english: He talks excessively about his own interests. How can he be trusted? ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਧ ਸਰਨਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਕਾਢਿ ਕਢੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo saadh saran mil sangat jit har ras kaadt kadteejai |
lines.english: I have sought the Sanctuary of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; I have found the Sublime Essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਗੁਣੀਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਸੰਤ ਭਗਤ ਹਰਿ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: praupakaar boleh bahu guneea mukh sant bhagat har deejai |7|
lines.english: They do good deeds for others, and speak of the Lord's many Glorious Virtues; please bless me to meet these Saints, these devotees of the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਗਮ ਦਇਆਲ ਦਇਆ ਪਤਿ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭ ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਖਿ ਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: too agam deaal deaa pat daataa sabh deaa dhaar rakh leejai |
lines.english: You are the Inaccessible Lord, Kind and Compassionate, the Great Giver; please shower us with Your Mercy, and save us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੀਅ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੫॥
lines.translit: sarab jeea jagajeevan eko naanak pratipaal kareejai |8|5|
lines.english: You are the Life of all the beings of the world; please cherish and sustain Nanak. ||8||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਾ ਹਮ ਦਾਸਨ ਦਾਸ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raamaa ham daasan daas kareejai |
lines.english: O Lord, please make me the slave of Your slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਕਰੁ ਨਾਰਦੁ ਸੇਖਨਾਗ ਮੁਨਿ ਧੂਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਕੀ ਲੋਚੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sankar naarad sekhanaag mun dhoor saadhoo kee locheejai |
lines.english: Shiva, Naarad, the thousand-headed cobra king and the silent sages long for the dust of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗਿ ਸਾਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ਪਿਵੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag saas hoe man antar saadhoo dhoor piveejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: As long as there is breath deep within my mind, let me drink in the dust of the Holy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਨ ਭਵਨ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਹੋਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਜਹ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਨ ਧਰੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhavan bhavan pavit hohi sabh jeh saadhoo charan dhareejai |1|
lines.english: All the worlds and realms where the Holy place their feet are sanctified. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੀ ਕਾਨਿ ਚੁਕਾਵੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਡੁਬਦਾ ਕਾਢਿ ਕਢੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dharam raae kee kaan chukaavai bikh ddubadaa kaadt kadteejai |2|
lines.english: Give up your fear of the Righteous Judge of Dharma, and you shall be lifted up and saved from drowning in the sea of poison. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਲਾਜ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਜੀਐ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਹੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: taj laaj ahankaar sabh tajeeai mil saadhoo sang raheejai |
lines.english: So let go of your shame and renounce all your egotism; join with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and remain there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਬਿਲਮੁ ਪਲੁ ਢਿਲ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ਜਾਇ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਨਿ ਲਗੀਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa te bilam pal dtil na keejai jaae saadhoo charan lageejai |3|
lines.english: So do not delay, even for an instant - go and fall at the feet of the Holy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮਿ ਸੂਕੇ ਬਹੁ ਉਭਿ ਸੁਕ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: bharam sooke bahu ubh suk kaheeeh mil saadhoo sang hareejai |
lines.english: Some are standing, parched and shrivelled up by their doubts; joining the Saadh Sangat, they are rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕੀਰਤਨ ਰਤਨ ਵਥੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਪਾਸਿ ਰਖੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam keeratan ratan vath har saadhoo paas rakheejai |
lines.english: The Kirtan of the Praise of the Lord's Name is a priceless jewel. The Lord has given it for the Holy to keep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬਚਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕਾਢਿ ਧਰੀਜੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo bachan gur sat sat kar maanai tis aagai kaadt dhareejai |4|
lines.english: Whoever accepts and follows the Word of the Guru's Teachings as True - this Jewel is taken out and given to him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਾਢੀ ਬਾਹ ਕੁਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: santahu sunahu sunahu jan bhaaee gur kaadtee baah kukeejai |
lines.english: Listen, O Saints; listen, humble Siblings of Destiny: the Guru raises His Arms and sends out the call.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਆਤਮ ਕਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਿਤ ਲੋੜਹੁ ਤਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਵੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: je aatam kau sukh sukh nit lorrahu taan satigur saran paveejai |5|
lines.english: If you long for everlasting peace and comfort for your soul, then enter the Sanctuary of the True Guru. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੁ ਹੋਇ ਅਤਿ ਨੀਕਾ ਤਾਂ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: je vaddabhaag hoe at neekaa taan guramat naam drirreejai |
lines.english: If you have great good fortune and are very noble, then implant the Guru's Teachings and the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਜਗੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਸਹਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabh maaeaa mohu bikham jag tareeai sahaje har ras peejai |6|
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is totally treacherous; drinking in the Sublime Essence of the Lord, you shall easily, intuitively cross over the world-ocean. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਜੋ ਅਧਿਕਾਈ ਵਿਚਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਪਚੈ ਪਚੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa maaeaa ke jo adhikaaee vich maaeaa pachai pacheejai |
lines.english: Those who are totally in love with Maya, Maya, shall rot away in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਰਮ ਰਮੁ ਰਮ ਰਮ ਰਾਮੈ ਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak raam ram ram ram ram raamai te gat keejai |
lines.english: O Nanak, chanting the Name of the Lord, the All-pervading Lord, one is emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਮਹਾ ਪੰਥੁ ਬਿਖੜਾ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਭਾਰਿ ਲਦਿ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: agiaan andher mahaa panth bikharraa ahankaar bhaar lad leejai |7|
lines.english: The path of ignorance and darkness is utterly treacherous; they are loaded down with the crushing load of egotism. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੈ ਰਲੈ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੬॥ ਛਕਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai taa naam drirraae raam naamai ralai mileejai |8|6| chhakaa 1 |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, the Naam is implanted within; we are united and blended with the Lord's Name. ||8||6|| First Set of Six||
